message:
test(unit): expand dataflow.rs inline tests (24→87) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 63 new unit tests for reactive dataflow graph covering:
- Value: serde roundtrip (all 5 variants), display formatting, equality,
  clone, is_truthy for negative values
- NodeId: serde roundtrip, hash/equality, debug format
- DataflowError: display messages for all 4 variants, clone
- PropagationStats: default trait, serde roundtrip, total_nodes, elapsed
- GraphSnapshot: edges, sorted nodes/edges, deserialization roundtrip,
  empty graph, node kind string, topo_depth
- Query: get_label, get_value for nonexistent, is_stable transitions,
  node_ids, node_count/edge_count empty, default(), debug format
- add_edge: nonexistent from/to, valid edge creation
- remove_node: nonexistent, source, middle preserves others
- add_sink: nonexistent node error, sink removed with node
- Debounce: creation, first-change emission, flush with no pending
- Merge: empty, adds nodes, preserves values/edges, remaps IDs
- is_acyclic: empty, single source, diamond
- Complex: multi-level diamond, independent subgraphs, same-value no-dirty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
